title: fix(mcp): stop orphan processes from busy-looping on parent exit (Windows)
author: Project12x

gist.headline: Exorcising the ghost processes
gist.blurb: Fixed a pesky bug where our MCP server would leave behind ghost processes on Windows that chewed up CPU. Your computer's fans can finally take a break!
gist.summary: Resolved an issue in the MCP server where orphaned processes on Windows would fail to shut down and consume excessive CPU.
gist.impact: Windows users running the Pollinations MCP server will no longer experience runaway background processes eating up their CPU after closing their client.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot working together to cool down an overheated retro computer tower, turning it back to a healthy state.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny sweatband, using a lime green (#ecf874) leaf fan to cool down a chunky retro computer tower. A cute chunky pixel robot with a monitor head gives a thumbs up as the computer cools down. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and nostalgic.
